summary: initBundledSkills() registers all bundled skills at startup via require() calls. Skills: updateConfig, keybindings, verify, debug, loremIpsum, skillify, remember, simplify, batch, stuck. Conditional: dream (KAIROS), hunter (REVIEW_ARTIFACT), loop (AGENT_TRIGGERS), scheduleRemoteAgents (AGENT_TRIGGERS_REMOTE), claudeApi (BUILDING_CLAUDE_APPS), claudeInChrome (auto-enable check), runSkillGenerator (RUN_SKILL_GENERATOR).
